category_sources: Official repository README says Monkeysphere leverages OpenPGP keys for OpenSSH authentication.
source_facts.description says Monkeysphere uses the OpenPGP web of trust to verify SSH connections.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is monkeysphere; official repository README names it The Monkeysphere Project.
docs_sources: Official upstream repository README is the best project documentation surface found; Debian manpages cover packaged commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; Debian tracker links homepage to web.monkeysphere.info, and that upstream repository identifies itself as Monkeysphere with the same project purpose.
tags_sources: source_facts.description explicitly mentions OpenPGP, web of trust, and SSH verification; official README adds OpenSSH authentication and key management context.
